text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Phew... Great job, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You must also be tired. Let's take it easy today,
and—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... phew...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Oguri! Are you on your way home from
training too?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Creek. No, I'm just on my way to get a quick
snack before heading back out.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It'll be evening soon... Does that mean you'll be
running after dark?
choice_data_list: Isn't it dangerous to run on your own at night?
Isn't it dangerous to run on your own at night?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's fine. I'll keep an eye out for cars.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That doesn't make me feel any less worried...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you mind if I join Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If anything happens, it'll be easier to handle if she
has someone with her.
choice_data_list: You can't see where you're running in the dark...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If anything happens, it'll be easier to handle if she
has someone with her.
choice_data_list: You can't see where you're running in the dark...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness me. Thank you, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry to make you go out of your way...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No problem! We're friends, after all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek joins Oguri Cap later on for a
nighttime training session.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But a quick run wouldn't hurt...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh... But if something were to happen to you
while running in the dark, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sob... I'd bawl my eyes out!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Urk! S-sorry! I'll skip my run tonight, so please
don't cry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek smiles with relief as Oguri Cap
stands there flustered.
